metric_value: Access raises the bar for network client CTI; new benchmark for ease of use, network admin simplicity, and application openness
notes: Aberdeen's opening assessment of Access competitive position

metric_value: E1-like synchronous bus with variable-length time slots; addressable by all processing/peripheral elements; unique multi-bus integration
notes: Core technical differentiator enabling multimedia transport

metric_value: Runs Windows 3.1 in ROM; software upgradeable only from server or by trained personnel; near-indestructible reliability
notes: ROM-based OS strategy for stability and tamper-proofing

metric_value: Built-in hardware support for Microsoft TAPI; co-development with Microsoft for compatibility
notes: Key ISV/OEM partnership for enterprise telephony ecosystem

metric_value: Tandem Computer anticipates using Access as ruggedized lottery terminal in convenience stores
notes: Named enterprise customer planning Access deployment

metric_value: Aberdeen predicts broad and deep market for Telechips 'new CTI' technology across Global 1000 enterprises
Telechips Corporation did not achieve mass market scale; company dissolved; CTI appliance category displaced by smartphones and UCaaS platforms
notes: No evidence of commercial success at scale; iPhone (2007) disrupted entire CTI appliance market

metric_name: Gap between computer and telco suppliers in CTI
metric_value: Most computer suppliers treat telephony as just another application; telco suppliers cannot develop software in timely/cost-effective manner
notes: Aberdeen's structural market gap analysis; accurate observation in 1996

metric_value: First-mover in convergent voice-data appliance space; master of both computer and telephony domains
notes: Aberdeen's characterization of Telechips competitive advantage

metric_value: Kiosk-based sales/service, order entry automation, informational services to non-PC-literate users, point-of-sale deployment
notes: Market applications identified by Aberdeen from field research

metric_value: Successful field trials in entertainment, hospitality, and insurance industries; users at theme park unaware device was a computer
notes: Confirms usability thesis; theme park application documented

metric_value: Lower maintenance, administrative and lifecycle costs identified as key CTI market segment drivers
notes: TCO-based market drivers; remain valid for UC/endpoint purchasing decisions

metric_value: Telechips' underlying technology is inherently leverageable into a range of enterprise-scale office products and specialized application-oriented tools
notes: Aberdeen bullish prediction for technology platform extensibility

metric_value: Apple iPhone (2007) obsoleted dedicated CTI appliances; smartphone convergence achieved voice-data integration at mass market scale that dedicated appliances like Access never reached
notes: iPhone represented the ultimate realization of the voice-data convergence concept, displacing all proprietary CTI appliances

metric_value: Aberdeen defines 'new CTI' as hardware-bus-level integration of computer, telephone and human interfaces — distinguishing from software-layer integrations
notes: Novel analyst categorization; Aberdeen defining a new market category
